About

Mapping Earth. Sustaining Africa.

I am a PhD candidate in Geospatial Science at Addis Ababa University's School of Earth Sciences, with over 10 years of expertise in satellite remote sensing, GIS analysis, and machine learning applied to agricultural and environmental systems across Ethiopia and Africa.

My research connects Earth observation data to real-world decisions — helping governments and international organizations understand where food insecurity is most severe, how crops are changing, and which interventions have the greatest impact.

I am the founder of SpatialWise, a professional geospatial training and consulting platform building capacity in remote sensing, GIS, GeoAI, and spatial data science across East Africa.

Experience

Research & Professional Journey

A decade of applied geospatial science across academia, government, and international research organizations.

PhD Researcher — Geospatial Science
2021 – Present
Addis Ababa University · School of Earth Sciences
Dissertation on multi-temporal remote sensing and machine learning for smallholder crop type mapping and food security assessment across Ethiopia. Co-supervised by Dr. Paulos Getachew in collaboration with University of Twente (ITC), Dr. Michael Marshall and Dr. Mariana Belgiu.
Remote SensingGEEMLCrop Mapping
Founder & Director
2020 – Present
SpatialWise — Geospatial Training & Consulting
Founded and lead a professional geospatial training and consulting platform delivering capacity-building in remote sensing, GIS, Google Earth Engine, LiDAR, and spatial data science to students, researchers, and professionals across East Africa. Training fees: 1,000–1,500 ETB per session.
TrainingConsultingGeoAICapacity Building
Research Contributor — ViSTA Data Sprint 2026
2025 – 2026
CGIAR SPIA · ViSTA Initiative (Resourced) · EIAR · AAU
Contributed geospatial analytics to the ViSTA Ethiopia Data Sprint 2026 — integrating Sentinel-2 EO data with national agricultural survey datasets to support EO-based maize yield estimation modeling. Achieved 80.4% classification accuracy using machine learning workflows on the OlmoEarth platform.
EO Yield EstimationSentinel-2CGIARViSTA
IPORA SAEAP 2026 — Presenter
2026
Addis Ababa University · University of Bordeaux · IRD · Sciences Po
Presented research on adoption and diffusion assessment using remote sensing at the IPORA Strengthening Africa-Europe Academic Partnership (SAEAP) conference, Addis Ababa, 31 March–3 April 2026. Session chaired by Dr. Paulos Getachew; co-presenters included Dr. Michael Marshall, Dr. Mariana Belgiu, and Binyam Tesfaw (AAU).
IPORASAEAPAdoption & DiffusionRS
Geospatial Researcher
2019 – 2022
Ethiopian Institute of Agricultural Research (EIAR) / CIMMYT
Applied satellite remote sensing and GIS to support agricultural research including crop monitoring, land use change detection, and spatial targeting of nutrition-sensitive interventions.

June 2026
Ethiopian Institute of Agricultural Research (EIAR), Addis Ababa

Projects

Research & Applied Work

Geospatial research and applied projects spanning crop mapping, food security, environmental monitoring, and geospatial infrastructure.

Food Security
ViSTA Ethiopia Data Sprint 2026 — EO Yield Estimation
CGIAR SPIA · EIAR · AAU · March–April 2026

Integrated Sentinel-2 Earth Observation data with national agricultural survey datasets to generate maize distribution maps for 2017 & 2022, achieving 80.4% classification accuracy. Contributed to EO-based yield estimation for smallholder maize systems.

Sentinel-2OlmoEarthRandom ForestCGIAR
↗ Gallery↗ Event
GIS
The Rivers of Ethiopia — QGIS Geovisualization
QGIS · HydroSHEDS (WWF, 2018) · 2024

High-resolution cartographic visualization of Ethiopia's entire river network using QGIS, with hierarchical stream ordering, hillshade terrain, and publication-quality dark-theme symbology. Data source: HydroSHEDS.

QGISHydroSHEDSHydrologyCartography
↗ View Map
GIS
Geological Map — Geba Watershed
GIS Mapping · Research

Detailed geological and lithological mapping of the Geba Watershed using GIS, classifying rock formations and structural geology to support land use and environmental studies.

ArcGISGeologyLithologyWatershed
↗ View Map
LiDAR & 3D
LiDAR Point Cloud Analysis & 3D Modeling
3D GIS · Research · 2023

Processing and visualization of LiDAR point cloud data for high-precision DEMs, canopy height models, and 3D landscape reconstructions for environmental monitoring and forest structure analysis.

LiDARCloudCompareDEM3D Viz

Events

Conferences & Training

Recent professional engagements including conferences, training workshops, and research collaborations.

📅 31 Mar – 3 Apr 2026
IPORA SAEAP 2026 — Strengthening Africa-Europe Academic Partnership
📍 Addis Ababa University · Ethiopia  ·  Univ. de Bordeaux · IRD · Sciences Po

Session: Innovations for Food and Nutrition Security — Adoption, Diffusion, and Impact. Chaired by Dr. Paulos Getachew (AAU). Presentations on adoption & diffusion assessment using remote sensing (Dr. Marshall, Dr. Belgiu, Binyam Tesfaw, Mintesinot Berhanu, Samuel Getachew) and a case study on diffusion and impact in Afar forage context (Prof. Kaleab Baye et al.). Synthesis by Alemayehu Seyoum Taffesse (IFPRI).

📅 9–12 June 2026
Training Workshop — CropWatch & ETWatch · EIAR
📍 Ethiopian Institute of Agricultural Research (EIAR), Addis Ababa

Advanced training workshop on satellite-based crop and water monitoring technology. Covered the CropWatch and ETWatch cloud platforms to enhance agricultural resilience using satellite-based monitoring for African countries.


📅 Aug 2025 – Ongoing
SpatialWise Applied Geospatial Webinar Series
📍 Online (Zoom) & Addis Ababa · @Minteb11 · t.me/spatialwise

Premium professional training covering GIS, Remote Sensing, LiDAR, Python, MATLAB, R, Machine Learning, and GeoAI. Live sessions with certificates, practical skills, and materials provided. Every session: 1,000–1,500 ETB. Contact: 0922534389.
